message:
⚡ Two-phase OPA card loading for instant rendering (#1459)

Split checkGatekeeperStatus into two phases:
- Phase 1 (fast): Single kubectl namespace check with priority
  bypass, renders installed/not-installed in ~1-2s
- Phase 2 (lazy): Fetches policies and violations progressively
  for installed clusters only

Previously the card showed skeleton for 20+ seconds while all
kubectl requests queued behind other cards. Now Phase 1 bypasses
the queue and the card renders immediately with cluster status,
while policy details load in the background.

Changes:
- checkGatekeeperInstalled(): priority namespace check
- checkGatekeeperDetails(): constraint + violation fetch
- Progressive row rendering with "Loading policies..." state
- try/finally cleanup for global check flags
- Defensive defaults for policyCount/violationCount

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
